	{"bbox_2d": [85, 148, 142, 159], "text_content": "SCOPE"},
	{"bbox_2d": [85, 169, 891, 182], "text_content": "This specification describes RC0805 series chip resistors with lead-free terminations made by thick film process."},
	{"bbox_2d": [85, 214, 260, 226], "text_content": "ORDERING INFORMATION"},
	{"bbox_2d": [85, 234, 878, 261], "text_content": "Part number is identified by the series, size, tolerance, packing type, temperature coefficient, taping reel and resistance value."},
	{"bbox_2d": [85, 277, 266, 289], "text_content": "YAGEO ORDERING CODE"},
	{"bbox_2d": [85, 301, 176, 312], "text_content": "CTC CODE"},
	{"bbox_2d": [85, 326, 334, 339], "text_content": "RC0805 X X X XX XXXX L"},
	{"bbox_2d": [155, 340, 334, 352], "text_content": "(1) (2) (3) (4) (5) (6)"},
	{"bbox_2d": [85, 366, 203, 378], "text_content": "(1) TOLERANCE"},
	{"bbox_2d": [115, 387, 166, 398], "text_content": "F = ±1%"},
	{"bbox_2d": [115, 402, 161, 413], "text_content": "J = ±5%"},
	{"bbox_2d": [85, 428, 243, 440], "text_content": "(2) PACKAGING TYPE"},
	{"bbox_2d": [115, 450, 257, 461], "text_content": "R = Paper/PE taping reel"},
	{"bbox_2d": [85, 475, 430, 487], "text_content": "(3) TEMPERATURE COEFFICIENT OF RESISTANCE"},
	{"bbox_2d": [115, 496, 203, 507], "text_content": "- = Base on spec"},
	{"bbox_2d": [85, 520, 203, 532], "text_content": "(4) TAPING REEL"},
	{"bbox_2d": [115, 541, 243, 552], "text_content": "07 = 7 inch dia. Reel"},
	{"bbox_2d": [115, 556, 333, 568], "text_content": "10 = 10 inch dia. Reel (not preferred)"},
	{"bbox_2d": [115, 572, 257, 583], "text_content": "13 = 13 inch dia. Reel"},
	{"bbox_2d": [85, 597, 257, 609], "text_content": "(5) RESISTANCE VALUE"},
	{"bbox_2d": [115, 620, 285, 631], "text_content": "5R6, 56R, 560R, 5K6, 56K, 22M."},
	{"bbox_2d": [85, 644, 297, 656], "text_content": "(6) RESISTOR TERMINATIONS"},
	{"bbox_2d": [115, 666, 331, 678], "text_content": "L = Lead free terminations (pure Tin)"},
	{"bbox_2d": [519, 301, 672, 312], "text_content": "ORDERING EXAMPLE"},
	{"bbox_2d": [519, 323, 906, 350], "text_content": "The ordering code of a RC0805 chip resistor, value 56 Ω with ±1% tolerance, supplied in 7-inch tape reel is: RC0805FR-0756RL."},
	{"bbox_2d": [519, 383, 561, 393], "text_content": "NOTE"},
	{"bbox_2d": [519, 400, 900, 438], "text_content": "1. The “L” at the end of the code is only for ordering. On the reel label, the standard CTC will be mentioned an additional stamp “LFP”= lead free production."},
	{"bbox_2d": [519, 448, 895, 474], "text_content": "2. Products with lead in terminations fulfil the same requirements as mentioned in this datasheet."},
	{"bbox_2d": [519, 484, 877, 507], "text_content": "3. Products with lead in terminations will be phased out in the coming months (before July 1st, 2006)"},
